name: Gently Yonder — Pinterest auto-post via Buffer

meta.notes: Set two env vars in n8n before running: BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN (your Buffer API token) and BUFFER_PROFILE_ID (the Gently Yonder Pinterest board profile id from GET https://api.bufferapp.com/1/profiles.json?access_token=...). Test with one manual run first; if Buffer's /1/updates/create returns an error, Buffer's public API access may be restricted — fall back to Buffer's own scheduler.
